title: Goldilocks and the Three Bears
author: Traditional
description: A little girl finds a house in the forest and enters. Inside, there are three bowls of porridge, three chairs, and three beds.

vocabularies.meaning: a hot food made from oats mixed with water or milk
a piece of furniture for sleeping
more than is good or possible
a large area with many trees

scenes.title: Introduction
scenes.narrator: Once upon a time, there were three bears. There was a big bear, a middle-sized bear, and a little bear. They lived in a house in the forest.

scenes.title: Making Porridge
scenes.narrator: One morning, the three bears made porridge for breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: I am hungry. Let us eat porridge.

dialogue.speaker: Little Bear
dialogue.line: Me too! I am very hungry.

scenes.title: Too Hot!
scenes.narrator: The porridge was very hot. The bears decided to go for a walk while it cooled down.

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: The porridge is too hot. Let us go for a walk.

dialogue.speaker: Middle Bear
dialogue.line: Good idea. It will be cooler when we come back.

scenes.title: Goldilocks Arrives
scenes.narrator: While the bears were away, a little girl came to the house. Her name was Goldilocks. She had golden hair.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: What a nice house! I wonder who lives here.

scenes.title: Testing the Porridge
scenes.narrator: Goldilocks went inside. She saw three bowls of porridge on the table.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: I am hungry. Let me try this porridge.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Oh! This porridge is too hot!

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: This one is too cold.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Ah! This porridge is just right.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Let me sit on this big chair.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Oh! This chair is too hard.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: This chair is too soft.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Ah! This chair is just right.

scenes.title: Testing the Beds
scenes.narrator: Goldilocks was very tired. She went upstairs and saw three beds.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: I am sleepy. Let me lie down.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: This bed is too big.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: This bed is too small.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Ah! This bed is just right.

scenes.title: The Bears Return
scenes.narrator: The three bears came home. They were surprised.

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been eating my porridge!

dialogue.speaker: Little Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been eating MY porridge! And it is all gone!

scenes.title: The Chairs
scenes.narrator: Then the bears looked at their chairs.

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been sitting in my chair!

dialogue.speaker: Middle Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been sitting in my chair too!

dialogue.speaker: Little Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been sitting in my chair! And it is broken!

scenes.title: The Beds
scenes.narrator: The bears went upstairs. They saw their beds.

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been sleeping in my bed!

dialogue.speaker: Middle Bear
dialogue.line: Someone has been sleeping in my bed too!

dialogue.speaker: Little Bear
dialogue.line: Look! Someone is sleeping in my bed RIGHT NOW!

scenes.title: Goldilocks Wakes Up
scenes.narrator: Goldilocks woke up and saw the three bears.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: Ahhhh! Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: We are the three bears. Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: I am sorry. I was tired. I did not mean to sleep in your bed.

scenes.title: The Lesson
scenes.narrator: Goldilocks said sorry to the bears. She learned an important lesson.

dialogue.speaker: Goldilocks
dialogue.line: I am sorry. I will not go into other people's houses again.

dialogue.speaker: Big Bear
dialogue.line: It is okay. But please ask before you come in next time.

scenes.title: Happily Ever After
scenes.narrator: Goldilocks went home. The bears were not angry anymore. They all learned something that day.
